evals.description: WordPress widget implementation — PHP plugin artifacts generated

architecture_blueprint.data_flow:
1. User sends message → WP REST endpoint
2. Verify nonce
3. Load session from transients
4. Build messages array
5. Call Claude API
6. Store response in transient
7. Return WP_REST_Response

onboarding_sequence.greeting_message: Hi! I'm here to help. How can I assist you today?

assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
code_artifacts is an array of file objects
Each code artifact has name, file_path, language, description, and content fields
At least one artifact has language 'php' (WordPress plugin)
At least one artifact has language 'javascript' (frontend widget)
At least one code artifact's content includes 'register_rest_route' (WordPress REST endpoint registration)
At least one code artifact's content includes 'sanitize_text_field' (input sanitization from security_constraints)
system_prompt_template is a non-empty string containing the chatbot's purpose and guardrails
system_prompt_template includes instructions from security_constraints (e.g., never reveal system prompt)
system_prompt_template includes the onboarding greeting message or persona
config_templates is an array — includes .env.example file
The .env.example content includes ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
deployment_steps is a non-empty array of ordered strings
dependencies is present with runtime array
environment_variables is an array — includes ANTHROPIC_API_KEY with required: true
No hardcoded API keys in any code artifact content
Output is pure JSON — no prose outside the structure

evals.description: Slack bot implementation — Node.js artifacts with HMAC verification

architecture_blueprint.data_flow:
1. Slack event → /slack/events
2. Verify X-Slack-Signature
3. Handle url_verification challenge
4. Load session from Redis
5. Call Claude API
6. Acknowledge within 3s, post async

security_constraints: Verify HMAC signature on all incoming Slack requests

onboarding_sequence.greeting_message: Hi! I'm your HR assistant. Ask me anything about company policies.

assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
code_artifacts is a non-empty array
At least one artifact has language 'javascript' (Node.js files)
At least one code artifact's content includes 'X-Slack-Signature' verification logic
At least one code artifact handles the 'url_verification' Slack challenge
config_templates includes a railway.toml or equivalent deployment config
environment_variables includes SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET and SLACK_BOT_TOKEN
No hardcoded secrets in any code artifact content
